verses.text: Zedekiah kumpi a suahin kum sawmnih leh kum khat pha a, Jerusalem khua-ah kum sawm leh kum khat sung a uk hi. A nu' min Hamutal hi a, Libnah khua-a teng Jeremiah' tanu ahi hi
Amah in kumpi Jehoiakim bangmahin Pasian' hoihsaklohte hong sem hi
Topa in Jerusalem khuamite leh Judah gam mite ama kiang panin a hawlkhiatna zah dong dingin a hehna a lian hi.

Tua ciangin amah kumpi a suahzawh a kum kua kum, a kha sawmna, a ni sawm ni-in, Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar in a galkap khempeuh tawh Jerusalem khua a sim dingin hong kuan uh a, khuapi kimkotah galdalna a phut uh hi
Zedekiah in a ukzawh kum sawm leh kum khat a phakdong khuapi a kisim hi
Tua kum a kha lina, a ni kua ni ciangin khuapi sungah kial nasia lua ahih manin, mite in annek ding a nei nawn kei uh hi
Tua ciangin khuakulhpi kiphulet a, khuapi kimkotah Khaldea mite om napi-in, zan laitakin kumpipa' huan gei-a kulhte gel kikala kongpi tawnin galkapte taikhiasim uh a, Arabah gam lam a manawh uh hi
Ahih hangin Khaldea galkapte in kumpi Zedekiah nungdelh uh a, Jerikho zanglei-ah a phak uh ciangin a galkap khempeuh kithehthangin amah a taisan uh hi
Amaute in kumpipa a mat khit uh ciangin Hamath gam Riblah khua-a Babylon kumpipa kiangah puak uh a, amah in thukhenna a pia hi
Riblah khua-ah Babylon kumpipa in Zedekiah' muh mahin a tate thahlupsak a, Judah gam kumpi ulian khempeuh zong a thatlum hi
Babylon kumpipa in Zedekiah' mittangte a khelkhiatsak khit ciangin kol bulh a, Babylon khuapi-ah paipihin a sih mateng thong sungah a koih hi.
Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar in a ukzawh kum sawm leh kum kua a phak kum, a kha ngana, a ni sawm ni-in Babylon kumpipa a cing galkapmangpa Nebuzaradan, Jerusalem khuasungah hong lut hi
Amah in Topa' biakinnpi-a kipan kumpipa' inn leh Jerusalem khua-a inn lian khempeuh a hal hi
Amah tawh a omkhawm a galkap khempeuh in Jerusalem khua kimkota kulh khempeuh a susia hi
Kumpi cing galkapmangpa Nebuzaradan in mi zawngpen pawlkhat, khuapi sunga a kinusialai mite, Babylon kumpipa' lamah a tai mite, leh khutsiam mi a omlai teng, sal dingin a paikhiatpih hi
Ahih hangin kumpi cing galkapmangpa Nebuzaradan in leenggah lo a cing ding leh lo a kho dingin gamsunga a zawngpente pawlkhat a nusialai hi
Babylon mite in Topa' biakinnpi sungah a om sumngo khuamte, sumngo tuikuang leh a ngaknate suzan gawp uh a, sumngo khempeuh Babylon-ah a la uh hi
Tua banah, biakpiakna-a kizang beelte, vutluahnate, taitehte, kuangte, sikkeute, leh biakinn kikhopna-a kizang sumngo tawh a kibawl kuangte khempeuh zong a la uh hi

Biakpiakna-a kizang keuneute, mei-am luahna kuangdaite, kuangte, beelte, khuai meivakkhuamte, sikkeute, leh tuibuahna dinga kizang keute zong a la uh hi. Kham tawh a kibawl nate kham dingin ahi zongin, ngun tawh a kibawl nate ngun dingin ahi zongin kumpi cing galkapmangpa in a lakhia hi
Solomon kumpipa in Topa' biakinn-a dingin a bawl khuampi nih, tuikuangpi khat leh tua nuai-a a pua sumngo bawngtal sawmlenih leh a kingaknate, sumngote a gihna kiteh zolo hi
Tua khuamte khat ciangin pi sawmnih leh pi sagih sang a, a kimkot pi sawmlegiat pha a, a sahna zung li pha-in a sung a hawm ahi hi
A tunglam pi sagih leh alang ciang sumngo hi-in, tua mun teng a kimkotah sumngo tawh a kibawl mang kawlsing lim kisuai hi
Mang kawlsing a vekpi-in a kimkotah za khat om a, sawmkua leh guk bek a kilang hi
Kumpi cing galkapmangpa in siampi lianpenpa Seraiah, siampi lian a nihna Zefaniah, leh kongpi uk biakinn upa thum a paikhiatpih hi

Tua banah khuapi sung panin galkapte a uk galkapmang khat leh khuasunga a kimu kumpipa' uliante sagih, galkap zumlai a kem galkapmangpa' lai-atpa leh khuasunga a kimu midang sawmguk, khuasung panin a paikhiatpih hi
Kumpi cing galkapmangpa Nebuzaradan in amaute paipihin Riblah khua-a Babylon kumpipa kiangah a tun'pih hi
Babylon kumpipa in zong Hamath gam Riblah khua-ah amaute satin a thatlum hi. Tu-a bangin Judah mite a gam panun sal dingin a kilakhia hi
Nebukhadnezzar in sal dingin a paipih mi phazah hih bang ahi hi: Kumpi a suahzawh a kum sagih kumin Judah mi tul thum sawmnih thum
a kum sawmlegiat kumin Jerusalem khua panin Nebukhadnezzar in mi za giat sawmthum nih sal dingin a paipih hi
Nebukhadnezzar in a ukzawh a kum sawmnihlethum kumin kumpi cing galkapmangpa Nebuzaradan in a sal dingin Judah mi za sagih sawmli nga a paikhiatpih hi. A vekpi-in mi tul li leh za guk a pha hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Jehoiakhin A Kikhahna leh Babylon-ah A Kipahtawina

verses.text: Judah kumpipa Jehoiakhin sal a suahzawh kum sawmthum leh kum sagih a cin' ciangin Babylon-ah Evimerodak kumpi a suak hi. Tua kumpipa in Judah kumpipa Jehoiakhin hehpih a, tua kum kha sawm leh kha nihna a ni sawmnih leh ni nga ni ciangin thong sung panin a suaktasak hi
Hoihtakin hopih a, Babylon khua-a a ompih kumpi dangte sangin a sangzaw tutna a pia hi
Tua ahih manin Jehoiakhin in a thong puante a suahkhia hi. A nuntak sungteng khempeuh kumpipa' sabuai-ah nisimin an a ne hi
A sih mateng a nuntak hun sungteng nisimin a kisap khempeuh kumpipa in a pia tawntung hi.
